### Summary

Describe the change and its context.

### Type of change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore (build, tooling, deps)

### How has this been tested?
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tested locally
- [ ] Manual QA performed

### Checklist (best practices)
- [ ] PR targets `main` and is rebased
- [ ] Title follows Conventional Commits (e.g., `feat:`, `fix:`)
- [ ] Changes are scoped and minimal
- [ ] Public API changes documented
- [ ] Added/updated tests as needed
- [ ] No breaking changes, or clearly documented
- [ ] Updated README/Docs where relevant

### Screenshots (if UI / not applicable for library)

### Linked issues
Fixes #
